notes: Catalog of OTA subsystem packages this server offers. The loader reads only `updates`.
Each entry's `file` is resolved under the data dir (ETCO_ota_dataDir, default packages/ota/data);
length + sha1 are computed from the real file at startup, so an entry whose file is absent is
simply skipped until scripts/build-ota-packages.sh produces it.
fromVersion '*' matches any installed version (with a loop-guard: never offered once the robot
already runs toVersion). GetUpdateFrom serves the highest toVersion, so with both 12.10.0 and
13.0.0 present a robot is offered 13.0.0; 12.10.0 stays available as an intermediate step.
filter '' is a wildcard (matches whatever otaFilter the robot sends).
To add a skill subsystem (be / oobe-config / jibo-diagnostics), add an entry with that
subsystem name and a built <id>.tar; see README 'OTA update server'.

updates.changes: Platform OS 13.0.0 ('Last Dance', 2019-02-25 production) — the final Jibo firmware. Jetstream/Pegasus stack required by Phoenix and modern @be/be.
Platform Services 13.0.0 ('Last Dance' production). Paired with the os update of the same version.
Platform OS 12.10.0 (2018-08-23 production). Earlier Jetstream/Pegasus build; usable as a stepping stone toward 13.0.0.
Platform Services 12.10.0 (2018-08-23 production). Paired with the os update of the same version.
